name: Enchanted Field
effect: Upgrade Farms to Enchanted Fields, boosting their production based on assistants owned.
formula: (50 * (500 * x) ^ 0.5)%, where x is assistants owned.

name: Swarming Tower
effect: Upgrade Wizard Towers to Swarming Towers, boosting their production based on active spells.
formula: (2.5 * x ^ 2.5)%, where x is active spells.

name: Elven Training Ground
effect: Upgrade Warrior Barracks to Elven Training Grounds, boosting their production based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: ((50 * x ^ 0.85) + 50 * ln(1 + x) ^ 6)%, where x is total clicks all time.

name: Arboreal City
requirement: A2, Arboreal City Quest (1e23 Elven Coins found)
effect: Upgrade Citadels to Arboreal Cities, boosting their production based on Faction Coin find chance.
formula: floor(20 * (ln(1 + x)) ^ 2)%, where x is FC find chance.

name: Heaven's Domain
effect: Upgrade Heaven's Gates to Heaven's Domains, boosting their production based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (7 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is Mana Regeneration.

name: Holy Site
requirement: A2, Holy Site Quest (3e6 Mana Regeneration)
effect: Upgrade Cathedrals to Holy Sites, boosting their production based on time spent as Good this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.8 * x ^ 0.9)%, where x is time spent as Good this Reincarnation.

name: Goblin Bank
effect: Upgrade Witch Conclaves to Goblin Banks, boosting their production based on Coins owned.
formula: (650 + 10000 * (log10(1 + x)) ^ (3.1/(1 + 0.1 * (y + 1)))/30)%, where x is Coins owned and y is Ascension.

name: Slave Market
requirement: A2, Slave Market Quest (30,000 Neutral buildings)
effect: Upgrade Slave Pens to Slave Markets, boosting their production based on assistants.
formula: (floor(0.25 * x ^ 0.75))%, where x is assistants owned.

name: Undercity
effect: Upgrade Necropolises to Undercities, boosting their production based on time spent in this Era.
formula: (80 + 80 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is time spent this Era.

name: Flesh Workshop
requirement: A2, Flesh Workshop Quest (500,000% offline production bonus)
effect: Upgrade Orcish Arenas to Flesh Workshops, boosting their production based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (35 * x ^ 0.65)%, where x is Mana Regeneration.

name: Infernal Realm
effect: Upgrade Hell Portals to Infernal Realms, boosting their production by 40% per Trophy unlocked.
formula: (125 * x)%, where x is Trophies unlocked.

name: Burning Abyss
requirement: A2, Burning Abyss Quest (3,600 seconds Call to Arms)
effect: Upgrade Halls of Legends to Burning Abyss, boosting their production based on time spent as Evil this Reincarnation.
formula: for each digit of floor(1.25 * x): sum(digit ^ (2 + (floor(log10(1 + 1.25 * x) + 1) / 10))%, where x is Evil time this Reincarnation.

name: Olympian Hall
effect: Upgrade Halls of Legends to Olympian Halls, boosting their production based on Royal Exchanges purchased.
formula: (6 * x ^ 1.2)%, where x is Royal Exchanges purchased.

name: Mountain Palace
requirement: A2, Mountain Palace Quest (4,000 Royal Exchanges)
effect: Upgrade Deep Mines to Mountain Palaces, boosting their production based on buildings owned.
formula: (0.75 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is buildings owned.

name: Stonehenge
effect: Upgrade Stone Pillars to Stonehenges, boosting their production based on Maximum Mana.
formula: (30 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Maximum Mana.

name: Ziggurat
effect: Upgrade Ancient Pyramids to Ziggurats, boosting their production based on total Lineage levels.
formula: floor(x ^ 1.2)%, where x is total Lineage levels.

name: Sunken City
effect: Upgrade Labyrinths to Sunken Cities, boosting their production based on longest Era this Reincarnation.
formula: (75 + 7.5 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is longest Era this Reincarnation.

name: Forbidden Library
effect: Upgrade Monasteries to Forbidden Libraries, boosting their production based on spells cast this Era.
formula: (30 * (ln(1 + x) / ln(2 + (x % 10))) ^ 3)%, where x is spells cast this Era.

name: Dwarven Forge
effect: Upgrade Blacksmiths to Dwarven Forges, boosting their production based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (300 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Mana Regeneration.

name: High Bastion
requirement: A2, High Bastion Quest (5 free Excavation Resets this Reincarnation)
effect: Upgrade Royal Castles to High Bastions, boosting their production based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is clicks this Reincarnation.

name: Spider Sanctuary
effect: Upgrade Dark Temples to Spider Sanctuaries, boosting their production based on time spent offline this Reincarnation.
formula: (45 * x ^ 0.9)%, where x is time spent offline this Reincarnation.

name: Brothel
requirement: A2, Brothel Quest (1e9 spells cast this game)
effect: Upgrade Inns to Brothels, boosting their production based on Royal Exchanges made this game.
formula: (10 * x ^ 1.05)%, where x is Royal Exchanges this game.

name: Wyrm's Den
effect: Upgrade Iron Strongholds to Wyrm's Dens, boosting their production based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: (0.25 * (ln(1 + x) ^ 5)%, where x is Faction Coins found this Era.

name: Dragon Pasture
effect: Upgrade Farms to Dragon Pastures, boosting their production based on Maximum Mana.
formula: (0.65 * x ^ 0.65)%, where x is Maximum Mana.

name: Mercenary Camp
requirement: Mercenary, R75, 125,000 total buildings, Good alignment
effect: Upgrade Knights Jousts to Mercenary Camps, boosting their production based on Non-Unique Buildings owned.
formula: (1.5 * (1 + x))%, where x is Non-Unique Buildings owned.

name: Tyrant Garrison
requirement: Mercenary, R75, 125,000 total buildings, Evil alignment
effect: Upgrade Evil Fortresses to Tyrant Garrisons, boosting their production based on Offline production.
formula: ((85 + 8.5 * x ^ 0.85)%, where x is Offline production.

name: Freemason's Hall
requirement: Mercenary, R75, 125,000 total buildings, Neutral alignment
effect: Upgrade Inns to Freemason's Halls, boosting their production based on Combo Strike counter.
formula: (60 + 60 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Combo Strike counter.

name: Nexus
upgradesFrom: Wizard Towers / Witch Conclaves / Alchemist Labs
requirement: Nexus Quest (R130+, 25,000 Wizard Towers/Witch Conclaves/Alchemist Labs)
effect: Upgrade Wizard Towers/Witch Conclaves/Alchemist Labs to Nexuses, boosting their production based on time spent as Order this Reincarnation.
formula: (80 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is time spent as Order this Reincarnation.

name: Pavilion
upgradesFrom: Slave Pens / Warrior Barracks / Deep Mines
requirement: A2, Pavilion Quest (R130, 5 days of Chaos spells this game)
effect: Upgrade Slave Pens/Warrior Barracks/Deep Mines to Pavilions, boosting their production based on spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: (12 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is spells cast this Reincarnation.

name: Hall of Origination
requirement: A2, Hall of Origination Quest (R130+, 5 TD (5e42) Faction Coins)
effect: Upgrade Halls of Legends to Halls of Origination, boosting their production based on assistants owned.
formula: (0.75 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is assistants owned.
